title: pelargonium × splendens
intro: Pelargonium × splendens, also known as Geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the family Geraniaceae, commonly cultivated for its ornamental value and medicinal properties. The plant contains a variety of compounds, including geraniol, linalool, and citronellal, which have been used to treat various health issues, such as anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × splendens include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
